description: Patches applied to vendor/jsbsim for Emscripten/WASM compatibility. Applied in alphabetical filename order by scripts/apply-patches.sh; the 01-/02- prefix encodes the intended sequence.

patches.purpose: Emscripten libc/compiler compatibility: zero out ANSI terminal-color escape codes, fix strerror_r POSIX-vs-GNU selection, and broaden the BSD socket include branch to cover Emscripten.

Compile out socket/network/FlightGear I/O for the WASM target: guard feenableexcept, conditionally exclude socket sources from the InputOutput CMake target, and replace socket/UDP/FlightGear input/output instantiation with graceful XML error logs under __EMSCRIPTEN__.
